Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a car care service offered by Kargloss Autocare, such as Auto Detailing or Car Wash.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Service entity.

name.description: The name of the service, e.g., 'Auto Detailing', 'Cuci Mobil'.

description.description: A detailed description of what the service entails.

iconUrl.description: URL to an icon or image representing this service.

BusinessInfo.title: BusinessInfo
BusinessInfo.description: Stores static information about Kargloss Autocare, including address, contact details, and operating hours.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BusinessInfo entity. (Likely a singleton, e.g., 'main')

address.description: The full physical address of the business location.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude of the business location for map integration.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude of the business location for map integration.

operationHours.description: A descriptive string detailing the business's operating hours (e.g., 'Senin-Sabtu: 09:00 - 18:00').

phoneNumber.description: The primary contact phone number for the business.

whatsappLink.description: The direct WhatsApp chat link for customer inquiries and reservations.

instagramProfileLink.description: The URL to the official Instagram profile of the business.

Member.title: Member
Member.description: Represents a registered customer or member of Kargloss Autocare.

ServiceSchedule.title: ServiceSchedule
ServiceSchedule.description: Stores upcoming service appointments for members.

definition.description: Collection of static car care services offered.
